no: AI-generated English voiceovers for all BG1 characters by ColossusChang. Covers base game and TotSC. Does not cover Black Pits, Tutorial, or SoD.
sum: AI-generated English voiceovers for all characters in Baldur's Gate 1 and Tales of the Sword Coast.

co.no: Adds AI-generated English voiceovers to all BG1 and TotSC dialogue. Large download.

advisories.reason: Both add voice content to BG1 characters. VVE provides full AI voiceover for all dialogue; ZG provides curated voice packs. May cause audio inconsistencies if both installed.
